title: Cobblemon Fossils Plus ✨🦖
description: This mod adds 3 types of fossils that you will need to put in your reanimation machine.
body:
🦖 Cobblemon Fossils Plus (Beta)
This add-on for Cobblemon introduces powerful ancient fossils. Bring them to your reanimation machine to obtain perfect, rare, and unique Pokémon!

✨ Key Features:

🔴 Perfect Fossil (NEW): The ultimate treasure. Guarantees a Shiny Pokémon with 6 IVs at 31!

🟡 Shiny Fossil: Guaranteed Shiny Pokémon! No more endless hunting—revive this fossil and get that sparkle every time.

🟢 IV Fossil: The competitive edge. Gives you a random Pokémon with 6 IVs at 31 (Perfect stats).

🔵 HA Fossil: Unlock true potential with a guaranteed Hidden Ability on your revived Pokémon.

⚙️ Advanced Configuration (v1.1)
The config system has been completely rebuilt! You can now customize the drop rate of each fossil individually for any structure or biome.

⚠️ CRITICAL: You MUST delete your old fossilsplus.json file from the config folder. The new code is incompatible with the old format and will cause a crash if the file isn't refreshed.

Example of the new individual rates:

shiny_fossil: 0.05 (5%)

perfect_fossil: 0.001 (0.1%)

Default Balance: Drop rates have been slightly increased across the world to make your exploration more rewarding!

⚠️ Important Information:
Dependency: This mod requires Cobblemon to work.

Current State: 🏗️ Beta Version.

Visuals: Custom 3D models are in development. Currently, fossils appear as special colored coins (Red, Gold, Green, Blue).

📥 How to use:
Explore: Find fossils in structures (Ancient Cities, Villages, etc.).

Configure: Adjust individual rates in the JSON file to fit your playstyle.

Revive: Place them in your machine and claim your legendary reward!

🌍 Languages / Traductions :
English (Full support)

Français (Support complet)
